version_description: More accurate, more complete than other versions.

versions.version_description: This version has accurate chording and has a link to a video for reference.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
TAKE THE LONG WAY HOME

transcription and chart Peter Kruger
casparus50@yahoo.ca

small case letters above chord symbols
indicate individual notes:
c4: middle C, and notes above in that octave...
c5: C above middle C
c3: C below middle C  etc.
numbers behind notes will only be indicated
when notes enter another octave or begin a new line


fade in synth
      c6.......................................................
piano:                                  c2......................



synth:  c6...................c6..........................
                             bb5..........................
                             c5...........................

piano...c4 c c c c c c c c c c c c c c c c c c c c c
        c2 c c c c c c c c   c c



piano with harmonica ad lib:

[tab]|[ch]Cm7[/ch]            |[ch]Bb/C[/ch]           |[ch]F/C[/ch]            |[ch]C[/ch]            |
 *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *[/tab]

[tab]|[ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]       |[ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]       |[ch]C[/ch]              |[ch]C[/ch]            |
 *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *[/tab]

[tab]|[ch]Cm7[/ch]            |[ch]Bb/C[/ch]           |[ch]F/C[/ch]            |[ch]C[/ch]            |
 *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *[/tab]

[tab]|[ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]       |[ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]       |[ch]C[/ch]              |[ch]C[/ch]            |
 *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                       [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
    So you think you're a Romeo[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/C[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
    playing a part in a picture-show[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]
Take the long     way home[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Take the long way home[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                           [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
    If you're the joke of the neighborhood[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/C[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
    Why should you care if you're feeling good[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]     [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]  
Take the long      way home[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Take the long way home[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Em7[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G6[/ch]
   But there are times that you feel you're part of the scenery[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]F6[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F/A[/ch]
all the greenery       is comin' down, boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Em7[/ch]
  And then your wife seems to think you're part of the[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G6[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]F6[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
furniture     oh, it's pe culiar,           she used to be  so   nice.[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                          [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
    When lonely days turn to lonely nights[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/C[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
    you take a trip to the city lights[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]     [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]
And take the long     way home[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Take the long way home[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                        [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
    You never see what you want to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/C[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
   Forever playing to the gallery[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]     [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]
You take the long     way home[/tab]
              strings: e4  g  c5  b4
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                        
Take the long way home[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
   And when you're up on the stage, it's so unbe lievable,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]F6[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F/A[/ch]
    Ohh    unfor gettable,    how they a dore you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
   But then your wife seems to think you're losing your sanity,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F/A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
   oh, ca lamity,          is there no   way   out?[/tab]


[sax solo]
[tab]|[ch]Eb[/ch]             |[ch]Bb[/ch]             |[ch]F[/ch]              |[ch]C[/ch]            |
 *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *[/tab]

[tab]|[ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]       |[ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]       |[ch]C[/ch]              |[ch]C[/ch]            |
 *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *[/tab]

[tab]|[ch]Eb[/ch]             |[ch]Bb[/ch]             |[ch]F[/ch]              |[ch]C[/ch]            |
 *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *[/tab]

[tab]|[ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]       |[ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]       |[ch]C[/ch]              |[ch]C[/ch]            |
 *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *   *[/tab]


[verse 5]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
   Does it feel that you life's become a ca tastrophe?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]F6[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F/A[/ch]
    Oh, it has to be      for you to grow, boy.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Em7[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
   When you look through the years and see what you could[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G6[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Fadd9[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
have been     oh, what might have been,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F/A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
if you'd had  more  time.[/tab]


[closing sequence]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                           [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
    So, when the day comes to settle down,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/C[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
    Who's to blame if you're not around?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]     [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]
You took the long     way home[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Ab/C[/ch]
You took the long way home...........[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F/C[/ch]
You took the long way home...........[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]     [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]
You took the long     way home...........[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Ab/C[/ch]
You took the long way home...........[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F/C[/ch]
You took the long way home...........[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]     [ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch]
You took the long      way home...........[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F/C[/ch]
You took the long way home...........[/tab]

aaa   aaaaa    aaaaa   aaaaaaaaa[/tab]
[tab][ch]F6/C[/ch]           [ch]G/C[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
ooo   ooooo    ooooo   ooooo[/tab]
[tab][ch]F6/C[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
aaa   aaaaa    aaaaa   aaaaaaaaa[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]        [ch]Ab/C[/ch]            [ch]F/C[/ch]
long     way home    long way home   long way home[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]         [ch]Ab/C[/ch]            [ch]F/C[/ch]
long     way   home   long way home   long way home[/tab]
               harmonica:  g4........
[tab][ch]Bbsus2/C[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
long     way ho-o-o-o-ome[/tab]
